ZULU LWAZI

Welcome to Zulu Testnet Testing Event

Welcome to Zulu Nation! We are issuing the battle cry to all Warriors for Zulu Nation!
The first stage for Zulu is called Lwazi (which means knowledge). Please join our testnet first marketing campaign, where you can gain Zulu Genesis Points (ZGP) and also gain Knowledge for Zulu Network, to become a Zulu Lwazi!

Join Zulu to Earn Zulu Genesis Points (ZGP)

Get Started
Link to X
Join Our Discord
Join Our Telegram
Your Referral Code(Optional)

How to Earn Zulu
Genesis Points (ZGP)

  1. 1. Daily sign-ins: connect your wallet on www-testnetzulunetwork-io.pages.dev to get the daily sign-in ZGP!
  2. 2. Complete Quests: Take on various quests within the platform and earn more ZGP.
  3. 3. Use Zulu Bridge: Experience the power of cross-chain interoperability by utilizing Zulu's innovative bridge feature.

Why Participate?

  1. 1. Boost Market Presence: Your active participation helps us create buzz and excitement around Zulu Network, attracting more users and investors to our ecosystem.
  2. 2. Foster Community Engagement: Join a vibrant community of blockchain enthusiasts, share your experiences, and connect with like-minded individuals from around the globe.
  3. 3. Shape Zulu's Future: Your feedback is invaluable in shaping the future of Zulu Network. Help us improve our products and services by sharing your thoughts and suggestions.

Join us in shaping the future of decentralized finance and blockchain technology. Let's make history together with Zulu Network!

Ready to earn Alpha points and be a part of something revolutionary? Start now!

Join the Zulu Community
